surfaces.description: Product home
Foundry manual
Operator dashboard (auth)
Desktop-first AI code review workbench for agent-generated code. Local SQLite, Tauri shell, evidence-backed review — your repo never hits a central server.
AI-powered resume tailoring. Score fit against a job description, rewrite bullets for the role, and prep interviews.
Daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance — five sections with inline hit-rates, no signup required.
Link-in-bio registry for humans and AI agents. Publish trust cards with public manifests at /{slug}/agent.json.
Life planner for private daily rituals and public living — hobbies, bucket lists, and side quests over time.
Evidence-graded reference for remedies organized by body part — body → condition → remedy → compound → study, with citations.
Drop-in backend services for SaaS apps. API docs for Foundry (feedback, waitlist, testimonials, and more).
GitHub stars organizer with semantic search — sub-product of CodeVetter for repo intelligence.
Multi-axis rating tool for structured directories and catalogs — decisions with explicit trade-offs, not star averages.
Hiring-side companion under RolePatch for evaluating candidates with structured role fit.
Academic paper platform over a high-citation OpenAlex CS corpus — search, analytics, and RAG demo (~488k papers).
Mac-local LLM specialist factory — post-training and runtime that fits on one Mac, plus WebGPU playground.
On-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen and acts with local context.
Ahrefs Domain Rating tracker feeding High Signal /domains and fleet domain marketing work.
TV-style random video player for lean-back browsing of curated channels.
Anime and manga discovery with multi-axis filtering and watchlists.
AI-coached chess game for practice with coaching feedback.
Research library: capture, annotate, and AI-chat over your reading — private by default.
Gmail workspace with local semantic search — private email tooling.
OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway fronting free-tier models across multiple providers.
SWE learning OS with FSRS spaced repetition, drills, and feedback.
Distributional Lighthouse / PageSpeed audits with grounded performance analysis across the fleet.
Source-aware Indian protein product intelligence.
AI-powered grand-strategy history game.
Cited search over private project corpora.
Scored catalog of SaaS product ideas.

auth.notes: Auth-walled app routes are not agent-indexed unless listed here.
